name: Dragunity Knight - Areus
name_jp: ドラグニティナイト－アーレウス
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner Synchro Monsters
You can target face-up cards your opponent controls, up to the number of face-up Monster Cards in your Spell & Trap Zone; negate their effects until the end of this turn. This is a Quick Effect if this card is equipped with an Equip Card. While this card is equipped to a monster: You can Special Summon this card, then you can Special Summon 1 "Dragunity" Tuner from your GY. You can only use each effect of "Dragunity Knight - Areus" once per turn.
mnst_eff:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner Synchro Monsters
You can target face-up cards your opponent controls, up to the number of face-up Monster Cards in your Spell & Trap Zone; negate their effects until the end of this turn. This is a Quick Effect if this card is equipped with an Equip Card. While this card is equipped to a monster: You can Special Summon this card, then you can Special Summon 1 "Dragunity" Tuner from your GY. You can only use each effect of "Dragunity Knight - Areus" once per turn.
eff:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner Synchro Monsters
You can target face-up cards your opponent controls, up to the number of face-up Monster Cards in your Spell & Trap Zone; negate their effects until the end of this turn. This is a Quick Effect if this card is equipped with an Equip Card. While this card is equipped to a monster: You can Special Summon this card, then you can Special Summon 1 "Dragunity" Tuner from your GY. You can only use each effect of "Dragunity Knight - Areus" once per turn.

action: Applies effect while equipped with an Equip Card
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
summoning: Does not require specific Tuner Synchro Materials
Requires Synchro Monsters only as non-Tuner Synchro Materials
Special Summons itself from your Spell & Trap Zone
misc: Can be activated during either player's turn
